div.p: Memory Map Legend ■ Header / Key Identifiers ■ Critical Data Path ■ Pointers / Register Args ■ Metrics / Timing ■ Line Buffer (outbuf) ■ Padding --- Cache Line Boundary (64B)
⚠ x86_64 Syscall Convention Argument 4 is passed in r10, not rcx (which is clobbered by the syscall instruction).
Performance Hot Path Fields f0-f9 fit in a single cache line. Accessed on every ptrace context switch.
